job_type_catalog.ingest_redact: Pre-ingest or pre-export redaction / normalization over raw turns, events, or external content.
job_type_catalog.extract_observations: Extract structured observations from raw or working inputs.
job_type_catalog.summarize_run: Compress a run, task, or session into a compact summary artifact.
job_type_catalog.aggregate_longterm: Merge observations and summaries into longterm outlines or topic documents.
job_type_catalog.canonicalize_candidates: Produce canonical memory candidates without directly bypassing writer gate truth-layer controls.
job_type_catalog.verify_gate: Verify promotion, export, or writeback decisions against policy and risk gates.
job_type_catalog.mine_skill_candidates: Mine reusable skill or workflow candidates from memory and execution traces.

route_reason_code_catalog.single_model_missing_primary: single_model profile exists but has no primary_model_id.
route_reason_code_catalog.job_map_hit: job_map resolved directly from the explicit job mapping.
route_reason_code_catalog.job_map_primary_fallback: job_map missed the explicit job mapping and fell back to primary_model_id.
route_reason_code_catalog.job_map_miss: job_map had neither a direct job mapping nor a valid primary fallback.
route_reason_code_catalog.mode_profile_hit: mode_profile resolved directly from the explicit mode mapping.
route_reason_code_catalog.mode_profile_primary_fallback: mode_profile missed the explicit mode mapping and fell back to primary_model_id.
route_reason_code_catalog.mode_profile_miss: mode_profile had neither a direct mode mapping nor a valid primary fallback.
route_reason_code_catalog.profile_resolution_failed: No winning active profile could be resolved.
route_reason_code_catalog.profile_contract_invalid: The winning profile failed contract validation.
route_reason_code_catalog.selected_model_invalid: The selected model id is missing, disabled, or not registered.
route_reason_code_catalog.budget_blocked: The selected route exceeded budget constraints and no valid fallback was available.
route_reason_code_catalog.local_downgrade_budget_blocked: The selected route exceeded budget constraints and downgraded to a local model.
route_reason_code_catalog.remote_blocked: The selected route was blocked by remote-execution policy and no valid fallback was available.
route_reason_code_catalog.local_downgrade_remote_blocked: The selected route was blocked by remote-execution policy and downgraded to a local model.

deny_code_dictionary.meaning: No active memory model profile could be resolved for the current user and scope.
Resolved memory model profile exists but is disabled.
Configured model id is unknown, malformed, or no longer available.
Configured model is not allowed for the requested job type.
Configured or fallback route requires remote execution but policy, sensitivity, or user settings block remote.
Configured route exceeds the allowed token or cost budget.
Primary model is unavailable and no valid fallback policy exists.
Route was resolved but audit persistence failed, so execution must fail closed.

rules: single_model requires primary_model_id.
job_map requires at least one job_model_map entry.
mode_profile requires at least one mode_model_map entry.
project_mode scope must include both project id and mode.
Disabled profiles must never resolve as active winners.
job_model_map keys must all belong to job_type_enum.
Unknown external job types must fail closed and must never be silently remapped.
Route resolution must use the highest-precedence active profile unless preferred_profile_id is explicitly allowed and matches the current scope.
If remote_allowed_by_policy is false, remote-only routes must deny or downgrade; they must never silently execute remotely.
Secret jobs default to local-only unless a later approved policy version explicitly changes the rule.
job_type must be a member of job_type_enum; unknown values must fail closed.
If deny_code is present, execution must fail closed and no worker run may start.
route_source and selected_by_user must agree with the winning profile and applied fallback logic.
Replay of the same job input must remain deterministic unless a newer profile version is explicitly requested.
route_reason_code must come from the documented route_reason_code_catalog or a later explicitly versioned extension.
Resolution chain entries must follow the documented precedence order.
scope_ref_redacted must stay redacted and must never expose raw secret identifiers.
Unmatched chain entries must still explain why they lost via skip_reason or equivalent explicit state.
Diagnostics payload is read-only and must never override or re-resolve the winning route.
winning_profile and route_result must match the authoritative route result contract.
fallback_snapshot.derived_fallback_action, if present, is display-only and must be derived from route_result fields rather than becoming a new source-of-truth contract.
Diagnostics payload must not include raw preference JSON, model filesystem paths, provider secrets, or raw budget internals.
